changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-lsp/src/daemon.rs (17.3% coverage, 36/208 lines)

Uncovered functions:
- start() - binary check, spawn, initialize handshake, stderr drain, JSON-RPC client setup (lines 151-268)
- shutdown() - graceful LSP shutdown sequence (lines ~270-320)
- restart() - stop + start with backoff (lines ~328-345)
- health_check() - check if child process is alive (lines ~351-378)
- initialize_handshake() - LSP initialize/initialized protocol (lines ~381-434)
- client() - mutex-guarded client access with poison recovery (lines 120-133)

This is the core LSP process management. Testing requires either a real LSP server binary or a mock stdin/stdout process. Consider testing with a simple echo server or the error paths (binary not found, spawn failure, timeout)."
